---
title: "Fairness in Machine Learning"
short-title: "Fairness in ML"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Individual and group fairness, equalized odds, and impossibility theorems."
keywords: ["fairness", "machine learning", "equalized odds", "impossibility", "Dwork"]
---

# Fairness in ML {#sec-fairness-ml}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
